name: US Federal Government (Research)
notes: Official USAJOBS API (free key via developer.usajobs.gov; env USAJOBS_API_KEY + USAJOBS_EMAIL). Federal roles are not H-1B cap-exempt in the usual sense and mostly require citizenship; the Veritas analyzer labels each posting honestly. Included by explicit user opt-in.
